clothingItems.name: Flowy Strapless Top
clothingItems.description: A flowy top made of soy silk.

clothingItems.name: Denim Miniskirt
clothingItems.description: A short denim skirt.

clothingItems.name: Open-toed Sandals
clothingItems.description: A pair of open-toed sandals with a wedge heel.

clothingItems.name: Oversized Denim Jacket
clothingItems.description: A loose-fitting, light-wash denim jacket often decorated with patches or pins. A casual layering staple worn across many subcultures.

clothingItems.name: Zip-Up Hoodie
clothingItems.description: A fitted zip-front hooded sweatshirt, worn everywhere from skate parks to shopping malls. A casual youth culture staple.

clothingItems.name: Velour Track Jacket
clothingItems.description: A fitted velour zip-up track jacket with a plush texture. Popularized by celebrities as a casual luxury statement piece.

clothingItems.name: Bomber Jacket
clothingItems.description: A lightweight jacket with ribbed cuffs and collar, originally designed for military pilots. Adopted by streetwear culture as a versatile outer layer.

clothingItems.name: Oversized Blazer
clothingItems.description: A relaxed, boyfriend-fit blazer with rolled sleeves. Blends menswear tailoring with an effortless, gender-fluid sensibility.

clothingItems.name: Neon Crop Top
clothingItems.description: A bright neon crop top in stretchy spandex, cut above the waist. Popular for aerobics, dance, and nights out where bold color was king.

clothingItems.name: Polo Shirt
clothingItems.description: A pastel-colored polo shirt worn with the collar popped. A preppy staple associated with brands like Lacoste and Ralph Lauren.

clothingItems.name: Band T-Shirt
clothingItems.description: A black concert tee featuring a rock or metal band logo, often cut or customized. A badge of musical identity and youth culture.

clothingItems.name: Babydoll Dress
clothingItems.description: A short, loose-fitting dress with an empire waist and floral print. Often worn over a t-shirt or paired with combat boots for a contrasting look.

clothingItems.name: Oversized Graphic Tee
clothingItems.description: A baggy t-shirt with bold graphics, skate logos, or ironic slogans. The anti-fashion uniform of slacker culture.

clothingItems.name: Mock Turtleneck
clothingItems.description: A slim-fit mock turtleneck in black or neutral tones. A clean, minimalist essential that pairs well with almost anything.

clothingItems.name: Halter Top
clothingItems.description: A backless halter top, often metallic or sequined. A quintessential going-out piece designed to catch the light on the dance floor.

clothingItems.name: Layered Polo
clothingItems.description: Two polo shirts layered with both collars popped, often in contrasting colors. A bold preppy statement that doubles down on the collar.

clothingItems.name: Tube Dress
clothingItems.description: A strapless, body-hugging mini dress in a bold print or metallic fabric. Designed for nightlife and maximum visual impact.

clothingItems.name: Athleisure Tank
clothingItems.description: A moisture-wicking tank top with mesh panels, suitable for both workouts and casual wear. Blurs the line between gym clothes and everyday fashion.

clothingItems.name: Longline T-Shirt
clothingItems.description: An extra-long, curved-hem t-shirt that extends past the waist. A streetwear staple influenced by high-fashion and hip-hop culture.

clothingItems.name: Slip Dress
clothingItems.description: A minimal satin slip dress with spaghetti straps. Can be worn alone or layered over a turtleneck for a contrasting high-low combination.

clothingItems.name: Acid-Wash Jeans
clothingItems.description: High-waisted jeans with a bleached, mottled pattern created by treating denim with chlorine and pumice stones. A bold, eye-catching wash.

clothingItems.name: Denim Miniskirt
clothingItems.description: A high-waisted denim mini with a raw or bleached finish. A casual staple often paired with tights and leg warmers.

clothingItems.name: Baggy Jeans
clothingItems.description: Extremely wide-legged, low-slung jeans. Central to both hip-hop and skate culture, often worn with visible boxer shorts underneath.

clothingItems.name: Low-Rise Jeans
clothingItems.description: Ultra low-rise jeans sitting well below the navel, often bootcut or flared. A daring denim silhouette that prioritizes showing midriff.

clothingItems.name: Cargo Shorts
clothingItems.description: Knee-length cargo shorts with oversized utility pockets. A casual menswear staple popular in suburban and skate circles.

clothingItems.name: Skinny Jeans
clothingItems.description: Tight-fitting stretch denim that tapers to a narrow ankle. A slim, modern silhouette worn by all genders.

clothingItems.name: Jogger Pants
clothingItems.description: Tapered sweatpants with elasticized ankle cuffs. Bridges athletic and streetwear, part of the athleisure movement.

clothingItems.name: High-Top Sneakers
clothingItems.description: Leather high-top basketball shoes in bold colors. Popularized by hip-hop culture and basketball stars, turning athletic shoes into fashion.

clothingItems.name: Stiletto Pumps
clothingItems.description: Pointed-toe stiletto heels in bold colors. A power-dressing essential, projecting confidence from the ground up.

clothingItems.name: Combat Boots
clothingItems.description: Chunky black lace-up boots, especially Dr. Martens. Worn by grunge fans, goths, and anyone rejecting polished mainstream fashion.

clothingItems.name: Platform Sneakers
clothingItems.description: Chunky platform sneakers that add several inches of height. A playful, pop-culture-inspired shoe with a bold silhouette.

clothingItems.name: Sheepskin Boots
clothingItems.description: Sheepskin-lined suede boots with a soft, unstructured look. Worn year-round with everything from jeans to miniskirts.

clothingItems.name: Skate Shoes
clothingItems.description: Chunky, padded shoes with fat tongues and bold colorways, from brands like DC and Etnies. Built for skateboarding but worn as everyday footwear.

clothingItems.name: Minimalist White Sneakers
clothingItems.description: Clean, all-white leather sneakers with a simple silhouette. Elevated simplicity — versatile enough for any outfit.

clothingItems.name: Chelsea Ankle Boots
clothingItems.description: Sleek, elastic-sided ankle boots with a low heel. A versatile staple worn with everything from suits to jeans.
